scripts.mongodump: docker exec github-checker_mongo mongodump --db=github-checker --archive=/data/github-checker.gzip --gzip && docker cp github-checker_mongo:/data/github-checker.gzip ./dump/github-checker.gzip && docker exec github-checker_mongo rm -rf /data/github-checker.gzip
scripts.mongorestore: docker cp ./dump/github-checker.gzip github-checker_mongo:/data/github-checker.gzip && docker exec github-checker_mongo mongosh github-checker --eval "db.dropDatabase()" && docker exec github-checker_mongo mongorestore --nsInclude="*" --archive=/data/github-checker.gzip --gzip && docker exec github-checker_mongo rm -rf /data/github-checker.gzip
